posts.author: bpotter (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Sorry if I’m in the wrong board. I’ve only found confusing answers to my questions elsewhere.

I’m making cookies and on Board 1 of the process of cooking making (Design, Bake, Pack).
On another Board 2 have inventory management with flour, sugar, butter. Each of these items has a number column showing the starting amount (1,000g).

What I want to do is when Board 1 status of Bake changes to Done, I want the flour in Board 2 to decrease by 100g.

I’ve tried mirroring but I don’t think I’m doing it properly.

Any way to achieve this?

Thanks
